files.epics/_about.md: Epic documentation — high-level features broken into user stories with acceptance criteria.
files.sprints/_about.md: Sprint documentation — goals, plans, and commitments for each sprint.
files.ceremonies/_about.md: Ceremony guides — standup, planning, review, and retro formats and agendas.
files.definitions/_definition-of-done.md:
The team's Definition of Done (DoD) — criteria that must be met before work is considered complete.

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Code reviewed and approved
- [ ] Unit tests written and passing
- [ ] Integration tests passing
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] No known defects
- [ ] Deployed to staging and verified
files.definitions/_definition-of-ready.md:
The team's Definition of Ready (DoR) — criteria a story must meet before it enters a sprint.

## Definition of Ready

- [ ] User story follows INVEST criteria
- [ ] Acceptance criteria defined
- [ ] Dependencies identified
- [ ] Estimated by the team
- [ ] Small enough to complete in one sprint
files.retrospectives/_about.md: Sprint retrospectives — what went well, what to improve, action items.
files.backlog/_about.md: Product backlog — user stories, epics, and prioritized work items.

files.prompts/_about.md: AI prompts and instructions — system prompts, CLAUDE.md files, and reusable prompt templates for your AI coding sessions.
files.changelog/_about.md: Session logs and changelogs — what was built, changed, or fixed in each coding session.
files.bugs/_about.md: Bug reports and issues — describe the problem, steps to reproduce, expected vs actual behavior.
files.ideas/_about.md: Feature ideas and brainstorms — capture ideas before they're lost, refine them into PRDs later.
files.prd/_about.md: Product Requirements Documents — describe what you want to build, the problem it solves, and success criteria.
files.todo/_about.md: Task lists and work tracking — what needs to be done, what's in progress, what's blocked.
files.context/_about.md: Project context files — architecture notes, tech stack decisions, and background info to feed AI tools.

files.specs/_about.md: Technical specifications and design documents for this project.
files.runbooks/_about.md: Operational procedures for deployments, incidents, and maintenance.
files.notes/_about.md: Scratch space for meeting notes, brainstorms, and quick captures.
files.features/_about.md: Feature documentation — requirements, acceptance criteria, and implementation notes.
files.decisions/_about.md: Architecture Decision Records (ADRs). Use numbered prefixes: `001-use-postgres.md`.
files.guides/_about.md: How-to guides, tutorials, and walkthroughs for the team.
